'''''Star Wars: Epic Duels''''' was a board game published by [[Hasbro]] in [[2002]]. It is now out of print.

The game features 4 maps and 31 miniature plastic figurines. There are 12 decks of 31 cards each featuring a major character and 1 or 2 minor characters. Players choose character sets and duel each other by rolling a die, moving their figures around the board and drawing and playing cards constituting "actions" each turn. The game is simple in design, but provides endless depths as no two duels are ever the same.

==Duel Maps {{SectionFlag|1}}==
*[[Kamino/Legends|Kamino Platform]]
*[[Petranaki arena|Geonosis Arena]]
*[[Carbon-freezing chamber/Legends|Carbon-freezing chamber]]
*[[Death Star II/Legends|Emperor's Throneroom]]

==Characters {{SectionFlag|1}}==
*[[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]], with two [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]]
*[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], with two clone troopers
*[[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]], with two clone troopers
*[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], with [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]]
*[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], with [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Princess Leia Organa]]
*[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], with [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]]
*[[Palpatine/Legends|Emperor Palpatine]], with two [[Emperor's Royal Guard/Legends|royal guards]]
*[[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]], with two [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]]
*[[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]], with [[Zam Wesell/Legends|Zam Wesell]]
*[[Dooku/Legends|Count Dooku]], with two [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|super battle droids]]
*[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], with two [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]]
*[[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]], with [[Greedo/Legends|Greedo]]

==Vassal {{SectionFlag|1}}==
The [[Vassal]] gaming engine has a gaming mod, or module, that allows you to play Star Wars: Epic Duels online in real time for free. This mod can be downloaded at the Vassal website [http://www.vassalengine.org] by going to modules and scrolling down to the Star Wars: Epic Duel mod.
